description.unified: Deals damage to enemies within range and stuns them for [5 sec->2sec].

Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for [30 sec->15sec], dealing Magic DoT every second and reducing Magic Defense by 10%. If recast within 15sec, the Magic Defense reduction is increased by 50%, stacking up to 5times.This increase effect cannot be dispelled.

Deals Magic Damage every second to all enemies for [15 sec->14 sec], and recovers HP equal to [100%->75%] of damage dealt. During the duration, all allies take [ (added) 10% reduced Physical Damage], and enemies affected by [Mark of Death] take additional Magic Damage. [(removed) stun on hit, CC immunity]

Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 55*(1+0.3*Skill Level). When taking damage that would be fatal, enters [Coffin] state for 5sec, restoring 197*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+153.7% of Attack Power + [6%->10%] of Max HP. [Coffin]:Attack Speed changes do not affect the target. The target is immune to all damage and deals Magic Damage equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every 1sec. [(removed) Increases M.DEF of all allies]

light.unified: Recovers HP equal to 50% of damage dealt. [(removed) Target takes 25% increased M.DMG for 10 sec]

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->2000], but pulls the target toward you.

light.unified: Debuff duration is reduced to 10 sec, but damage is increased by [250%->500%].

dark.unified: All allies additionally take 10% less Physical DMG. [(removed) Upon use, dispels negative effects of all allies]
When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for [2 sec->1 sec].

description.unified: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target’s CC Resist by [250->320] and Magic Block chance by {0} for [10 sec->4 sec].
[Mark of Death] When a marked enemy dies, increases own ATK by 5% and Crit DMG by {0}% for 20 sec. Stacks up to [8->16] times.
[Day of Ruin] increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target’s M.DEF by [5%->3%] for 5 sec each time damage is dealt. This effect can stack up to 10 times.
[Rest in Peace] reduces all DMG taken by {0}% for 10 sec after use. Cooldown set to 40 sec. [(removed) Dispels negative effects]

dark.unified: On hit, Attack and Healing increase by 1%. This effect stacks up to [50->35] times.

description.unified: Deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power per second to nearby enemies, reduces their Attack by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to 100% of damage dealt.
